skills.name: ydb-qdrant
skills.description: Use YDB-Qdrant when an agent needs a Qdrant-compatible vector database API backed by YDB for semantic search, RAG prototypes, or IDE memory.

skills.name: ydb-qdrant-code-indexer
skills.description: Use YDB Qdrant Code Indexer when an agent needs read-only repository memory over hosted Streamable HTTP MCP.
